name: Roast Chicken and Kiwi with Raspberry Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. See recipe for Raspberry Glaze.
2. Sprinkle the chicken with salt and pepper.
3. Place the chicken, skin side up, in a single layer in a large shallow baking pan.
4. Brush some butter over the chicken.
5. Bake in a 400°F oven, basting frequently with butter, for about 45 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender.
6. Drain off the fat.
7. Spoon glaze over the chicken. Repeat glazing procedure using sauce that gathers in the pan.
8. Top with kiwi slices, using 1 kiwi per half chicken.
9. Return to oven and bake for about 3 minutes or until fruit and chicken are well glazed.
